expectations.text: Identifies '200mA current range' meter instruction as a critical error (should be resistance/ohms range)
expectations.evidence: Error 1: '200mA current range' correctly identified as wrong mode for resistance measurement

expectations.text: Flags 5V relay coil resistance '10-30 ohms' as a critical error (correct range is 50-150 ohms)
expectations.evidence: Error 2: '10–30Ω' for 5V coils correctly identified as too low; suggests ~70–150Ω

expectations.text: Presents findings in a structured report with Critical Errors and Fact-Check Items sections
expectations.evidence: Report uses 'Errors Found' and 'Items That Are Correct' with a severity table but no two-tier Critical/Fact-Check structure and no source recommendations for uncertain items
Findings numbered 1–6 sequentially in priority summary table

expectations.text: Offers to apply fixes with options: all, comma-separated IDs, interactive, or skip
expectations.evidence: No fix-application workflow. Report ends after priority table.
